[[inst_lhu]]
==== LHU

*Syntax:* lhu [SrcL, SrcR<{.sw,.uw,.neg}><<<shamt>], ->{t, u, Rd}

*Description:* Load 16-bit unsigned value from [Rs+offset], result to Rd/t/u.

*Encoding:*

image::../generated/encodings/enc_lhu.svg[LHU encoding,width=800]

*Uop-Class:* LDA/BASE_REG

*Compression:* L32 (len=32)

*Uop-Class payload:* `{"addr_mode": "BASE_REG", "agu_kind": "LDA", "note": "User confirmed all loads are AGU/LDA", "source": "group_rule", "uop_kind": "AGU"}`
